success_condition: A first-customer onboarding template exists for controlled pilot intake, customer data collection, forbidden claims, test questions, and GO/HOLD/NO-GO review.
stop_condition: Stop if runtime code, pricing page changes, public page changes, paid provider activation, or customer private data is required.
next_action: Create a documentation template only. Keep it evidence-gated and pilot-focused.
note: Customer onboarding template merged to efro main.

success_condition: A repeatable evidence sheet exists for recording first-pilot questions, answer quality, missing data, screenshots, and final GO/HOLD/NO-GO decision.
stop_condition: Stop if runtime code, pricing page changes, public page changes, paid provider activation, or customer private data is required.
next_action: Create a documentation evidence sheet only. No customer data.
note: First pilot evidence sheet merged to efro main.

success_condition: A read-only landingpage rewrite plan exists with SAFE/HOLD/NO-GO messaging, section order, CTA direction, and claim boundaries.
stop_condition: Stop if public page editing, pricing editing, billing activation, or unsupported claims are required.
next_action: Create a read-only plan document only. Do not edit the public landingpage.
note: Read-only landingpage rewrite plan merged to efro main. No public page edit.

success_condition: A Shopify live smoke plan exists for owner-authorized dev-shop testing without secrets, billing claims, or code changes.
stop_condition: Stop if credentials, secret values, billing activation, app submission, or runtime code changes are required.
next_action: Create a documentation plan only. Do not touch runtime code or credentials.
note: Shopify live smoke plan merged to efro-shopify main. No runtime or credential change.

success_condition: Landingpage hero copy is made more sales-focused and pilot-safe without changing pricing, billing, APIs, admin pages, demos, package files, or deployment behavior.
stop_condition: Stop if broader redesign, pricing edits, billing claims, Shopify approval claims, new components, package changes, API changes, or deploy are required.
next_action: Prepare a minimal patch for src/app/page.tsx only: hero headline, subheadline, trust pills, and CTA wording. Do not edit pricing or runtime behavior.
note: Landingpage hero safe pilot copy merged to efro main. V3 safe patch runner used. No pricing, API, billing, package, push, deploy, or runtime behavior change.

success_condition: A minimal server-side Gemini Preview smoke endpoint exists with explicit guard flags, no secret exposure, no package changes, no production activation, and TypeScript passing.
stop_condition: Stop if a secret value is needed, client-side exposure is required, package changes are required, production deploy is required, or the endpoint would run without explicit preview/test guards.
next_action: Create a minimal server-side Preview-only Gemini smoke endpoint. Read GEMINI_API_KEY only server-side. Require explicit server env and request flag. Return sanitized GO/HOLD/NO-GO only.
note: Minimal server-side Gemini Preview smoke endpoint merged to efro-widget main. TypeScript passed. No secret exposure, no package changes, no production activation, no deploy. Actual Preview provider smoke evidence remains a separate HOLD/GO step.

success_condition: A public legal foundation audit exists for Impressum, Datenschutz, provider notices, cookie/tracking, AVV/DPA needs, and public-launch blockers.
stop_condition: Stop if legal text must be published, customer data is needed, secrets are needed, runtime code is required, or deployment is required.
next_action: Create a read-only legal foundation audit for controlled pilot vs public launch readiness.
note: Public foundation audit merged to efro main. No deploy.

success_condition: A release-gate audit exists showing what is needed for one reliable brain quality gate command and CI blocking behavior.
stop_condition: Stop if runtime code, model/provider calls, secrets, package changes, or CI mutation are required.
next_action: Create a read-only brain release-gate audit and gap list.
note: Brain release gate audit merged to efro-brain main. No deploy.

success_condition: A manual paid-pilot billing/contract spec exists that avoids false self-serve billing claims.
stop_condition: Stop if Stripe, Shopify Billing, provider charges, webhooks, pricing page changes, or deploy are required.
next_action: Create a manual pilot commercial package and billing hold spec.
note: Pilot billing contract spec merged to efro main. No deploy.

success_condition: A pilot ROI metrics spec exists for assisted cart value, add-to-cart, product recommendations, top unanswered questions, handoff requests, and weekly reporting.
stop_condition: Stop if analytics code, customer data, tracking pixels, provider calls, or deploy are required.
next_action: Create a read-only ROI metrics and pilot reporting spec.
note: ROI metrics pilot dashboard spec merged to efro main. No deploy.

success_condition: A human-handoff pilot spec exists for email/WhatsApp/CRM escalation, conversation summary, uncertainty handling, and owner review.
stop_condition: Stop if API integrations, customer credentials, CRM keys, runtime code, or deploy are required.
next_action: Create a read-only human handoff and escalation spec.
note: Human handoff pilot spec merged to efro main. No deploy.

success_condition: A tenant-security audit exists for shop isolation, signed contexts, cache leaks, rate limits, admin API auth, and public widget attack surface.
stop_condition: Stop if credentials, runtime code, production shop data, package changes, or deploy are required.
next_action: Create a read-only tenant-security audit for widget and Shopify readiness.
note: Tenant/widget readiness audit merged to efro-widget main. No deploy.
